questions.text: Which of the following is the standard form of a complex number?
choices: $a + bi$, where $a$ and $b$ are real numbers
questions.explanation: A complex number is written $a + bi$, where $a$ is the real part and $b$ is the imaginary part (the coefficient of $i$).

questions.text: If $z = 4 + 3i$, what is the real part of $z$?
questions.explanation: The real part is the term without $i$: for $z = 4 + 3i$, that is $4$.
